name: Grenada
avoid: June–November is wetter and overlaps the main Caribbean storm season, so ferry crossings, snorkel trips, and Grand Etang hikes are more likely to be disrupted.
Grand Anse fills up quickly around Christmas, New Year, and Easter, which pushes beachfront hotel prices above the island's normal shoulder-season range.
Carriacou is best done with a flexible buffer because Osprey ferry timings can shift with sea conditions and same-day returns feel rushed if the crossing is delayed.
stopoverNote: For trips under 6 days, most travelers should stay between St. George's and Grand Anse and treat Carriacou as optional unless the Osprey ferry schedule lines up cleanly with the rest of the trip.

cities.name: St. George's
cities.notes: Historic harbor capital for Fort George views, the Carenage, chocolate stops, market mornings, and easiest access to island buses and ferry departures.

cities.name: Grand Anse
cities.notes: Grenada's classic beach base for long swims, Morne Rouge sunsets, dive-operator pickups, and a good balance of resort stays and casual dining.

cities.name: Carriacou
cities.notes: Slow-paced sister island best for ferry-linked beach days, Sandy Island water taxis, Hillsborough village walks, and quieter guesthouse stays.

itinerary.sim: Digicel Grenada and FLOW Grenada prepaid data packs are the easiest short-stay options; budget roughly ₹1,200–₹2,500 for maps, WhatsApp, and ferry coordination, and download offline maps before the Carriacou crossing.

St. George's.name: St. George's
St. George's.note: Stay near the Carenage, True Blue, or Point Salines side if you want easier ferry-port transfers, restaurant variety, and fast bus access across the island.

days.theme: Fort views, harbor history, and Grenadian chocolate in the capital

activities.name: Fort George
activities.tip: Adult entry is commonly listed at EC$5.35, which works out to about ₹166 at ₹31 per XCD.

activities.name: Grenada National Museum
activities.tip: The museum's token EC$5 entry translates to roughly ₹155 and is easy to pair with a Carenage walk.

activities.name: Sendall Tunnel, Carenage waterfront, and Market Square stroll
House of Chocolate Grenada tasting stop

days.theme: Rainforest lake, cocoa estate, and old-rum north-island drive

activities.name: Grand Etang National Park & Forest Reserve
activities.tip: The Grenada Tourism Authority lists the park fee at EC$5.34, or about ₹166 per adult.

activities.name: Belmont Estate classic tour
activities.tip: Belmont's official classic estate tour is US$6, roughly EC$16.2 or about ₹500.

activities.name: River Antoine Rum Distillery guided visit
activities.tip: Recent visitor pricing commonly lists the distillery walk-through and tasting at EC$5 per adult.

activities.name: Annandale Falls
activities.tip: Recent listings put the falls entry at about EC$5.34 per adult.

Grand Anse.name: Grand Anse
Grand Anse.note: Grand Anse works best as the beach-and-water-activity base; Route 1 buses make it easy to reach St. George's without changing hotels.

days.theme: Grand Anse beach day with sculpture-park snorkeling

activities.name: Grand Anse Beach and Morne Rouge swim stops
Grenada Underwater Sculpture Park snorkel trip
activities.tip: Licensed operator trips usually land around EC$185–EC$200 including boat, guide, gear, and the EC$10 marine park fee.

activities.name: Grand Anse Craft & Spice Market browse

days.theme: Easy south-coast day with viewpoints and a resort-beach finish

activities.name: Beach-club sunset around Grand Anse
activities.cost: Free–₹1,500 pp depending on lounger or drinks

Carriacou.name: Carriacou
Carriacou.note: Spend at least one night after the ferry so weather or schedule changes do not turn the island into a rushed same-day dash.

days.theme: Osprey ferry arrival, Hillsborough village, and Paradise Beach

activities.name: Osprey Lines ferry from Grenada to Carriacou
activities.tip: The commonly listed adult one-way fare is EC$80, so arrive early with cash for ticketing.

activities.name: Hillsborough waterfront and Carriacou Museum exterior circuit
Hillsborough to Tyrell Bay taxi
activities.tip: The standard taxi fare is commonly listed at EC$35 for the cross-island run.

days.theme: Sandy Island boat day and quieter beaches around the sister island

activities.name: Sandy Island water taxi
activities.tip: Typical return pricing is around EC$27–EC$40 per person, depending on the departure beach and how many people share the boat.

activities.name: Anse La Roche beach or snorkel stop

connections.method: Route 1 local bus, taxi, or rental car down the south coast (about 10–15m)
Bus or taxi back to St. George's port, then Osprey Lines ferry to Hillsborough (allow about 15m transfer plus the sea crossing)
connections.cost: ₹2,560–₹2,700 pp including bus; higher if you take a taxi to the ferry terminal

extras: Route 1 minibuses between St. George's and Grand Anse usually cost EC$2.50–EC$3.00 each way, which converts to roughly ₹78–₹93; keep small cash ready because change can be slow during peak beach hours.

The St. George's to Grand Etang bus fare is commonly about EC$6 one way, or roughly ₹186 per person; for Belmont Estate and River Antoine on the same day, a rental car is much more practical than piecing together multiple buses.
Economy rental cars usually land around US$40–US$80 per day in Grenada, roughly ₹3,300–₹6,700, and most agencies also require the local temporary driving permit.
Underwater Sculpture Park trips are weather-sensitive; book the snorkel outing early in the Grenada mainland portion so you have room to rebook if visibility or seas turn poor.

December through May is the driest stretch and the best time for Grand Etang hikes, south-coast snorkel boats, and the Osprey ferry, but it is also the busiest period for Grand Anse beachfront hotels.
